Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 33 is available: 34
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.5.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.3 is available: 2.2.1

The image `app_icon.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/app_icon.png: 341x341 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-mdpi/app_icon.png: 512x512 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xhdpi/app_icon.png: 256x256 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/app_icon.png: 171x171 dp (512x512 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/app_icon.png: 128x128 dp (512x512 px)

The image `splash_logo.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/splash_logo.png: 683x683 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-mdpi/splash_logo.png: 1024x1024 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xhdpi/splash_logo.png: 512x512 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/splash_logo.png: 341x341 dp (1024x1024 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/splash_logo.png: 256x256 dp (1024x1024 px)
The `splash_logo.png` icon has identical contents in the following configuration folders: mipmap-hdpi, mipmap-mdpi, mipmap-xhdpi, mipmap-xxhdpi, mipmap-xxxhdpi
The `app_icon.png` icon has identical contents in the following configuration folders: mipmap-hdpi, mipmap-mdpi, mipmap-xhdpi, mipmap-xxhdpi, mipmap-xxxhdpi
